summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements well. REQ-1 through REQ-7 are substantially addressed with new/modified frontend pages, components, and styling. REQ-8 backend work is partially visible. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the Shorts page (REQ-4) uses a ReelsPage implementation rather than a dedicated ShortsPage with all required overlaid controls; the channel banner image is not clearly rendered on the ChannelPage; and the backend thumbnail field is absent from VideoMetadata. A SubscriptionsPage was added as a bonus page not explicitly requested as a new standalone page.

missing_requirements.requirement: Style the Shorts page as a vertical full-screen reel feed with each short filling 100vh, autoplay on scroll into view, pause on scroll out, and overlaid Like, Comment, Share, and Subscribe buttons
missing_requirements.reason: The /shorts route maps to ShortsPage which is imported in App.tsx, but the ShortsPage file content is not included in the diff. The ReelsPage shown implements scroll-snap and active index tracking but maps to /reels. It is unclear whether ShortsPage fully implements autoplay-on-scroll with all four overlaid action buttons (Like, Comment, Share, Subscribe). The ReelCard component content is also not shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Channel page displays the channel banner
missing_requirements.reason: The ChannelPage.tsx is truncated and the visible portion does not show rendering of a channel banner image (default-channel-banner.dim_1280x200.png). The spec requires displaying the channel banner prominently at the top of the channel page.

missing_requirements.requirement: All existing query methods return complete video metadata including a thumbnail field
missing_requirements.reason: The VideoMetadata type in backend/main.mo does not include a dedicated thumbnail field — it only has videoFile (ExternalBlob). The spec requires a thumbnail field separate from the video file for display in cards and grids.

missing_requirements.requirement: User profile query returns subscriber count as part of the profile data shape
missing_requirements.reason: The UserProfile type in backend/main.mo contains name, channelDescription, avatar, and handle but no subscriberCount field. Subscriber count is stored separately in a subscribers map and requires a separate getSubscribers query, meaning the profile object itself does not carry subscriber count as the requirement specifies.

hallucinated_features.description: CameraRecordingModal integration in ReelsPage with a camera FAB button for recording and uploading shorts
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asked for a camera recording feature or floating action button on the Shorts/Reels page. This feature was added without being requested.
